name: Salvage Beetle
visual_description: A stocky chitinous beetle with iridescent green-bronze carapace crawls across weathered metal debris. Its segmented legs grip rusted gears and broken machinery. Long spined antennae curve upward, and a faint metallic sheen clings to its armored body, suggesting it feeds on industrial remnants in a reclaimed wasteland.
full_prompt: A stocky chitinous beetle with iridescent green-bronze carapace crawls across weathered metal debris. Its segmented legs grip rusted gears and broken machinery. Long spined antennae curve upward, and a faint metallic sheen clings to its armored body, suggesting it feeds on industrial remnants in a reclaimed wasteland.. Stylized digital illustration, wide naturalist composition, rich earth tones with dappled light, layered depth, post-apocalyptic science-fantasy setting.
